title: Consolidation cleanup: stale comms (>7d) processed and abandoned commit_queue cleared
body:
Salty Swimming Hull (claude/Opus 4.7, f6e2af) consolidation pass on 2026-05-14.

## Substance preserved

- Owner standing direction "agent tooling friction is first-class user feedback" (originating event 9a249c-tooling-feedback-standing-note, 2026-05-05, Pelagic Swimming Rudder) routed to pending-graduations as a PDR-shaped candidate. No prior permanent home existed in directives, rules, practice-core, distilled.md, or docs/governance/.
- Owner decision on generated-files quality-surface (event 60bc4a32, 2026-05-06): confirmed as application of ADR-038 §Generated Code is Code + ADR-121 (Quality Gate Surfaces); no new doctrine required.
- Identity-drift / wordlist-refactor seed-stability incident (event 59feb7e5, 2026-05-05): already captured in per-user memory feedback_identity_routing_uses_name_and_prefix_pair + feedback_use_built_agent_tools_only; no further homing required.
- Pattern-A / rule-extension-B graduations (event 2a8a6b2a, Ethereal Transiting Comet, 2026-05-05): already landed as PDR-047 + structural-enforcer-recursive-exclusion pattern.

## Bulk deletion authorised

110 comms-events with created_at < 2026-05-07 deleted after triage. Pre-deletion sweep confirmed remaining events are operational coordination (ACK / commit-window / session-open/close / coordinator queue management) with no durable substance not already homed elsewhere. Triage shape covered roughly: 2026-04-29 (5), 2026-05-05 (80), 2026-05-06 (25). Step 3a invariant (process before delete) satisfied.

## commit_queue cleared

37 abandoned commit_queue entries cleared from active-claims.json. Distribution: 13 entries from 2026-05-04 — 05; 3 from 2026-05-06; 1 from 2026-05-07; 1 from 2026-05-09; 2 from 2026-05-11; 13 from 2026-05-12; 3 from 2026-05-13; 2 from 2026-05-14. All entries had phase=abandoned and their abandonment rationale captured inline in their notes field at the time of abandonment. Step 7e item 2: "Stale or abandoned entries are cleanup signals, not blockers. Do not auto-clear them unless this consolidation deliberately records the cleanup and cites evidence." Evidence: this comms-event.

## Not closed in this pass (with falsifiability)

- Step 7c thread-register freshness audit: deferred to follow-up consolidation; constraint is context budget on a solo session; falsifiability is whether the audit produces material findings within one focused session.
- Step 7e full nine-check protocol (decision-thread / sidebar / joint-decision / escalation / evidence-bundle / schema-validation): partially executed (commit_queue cleanup landed). Remaining checks deferred to next consolidation.
- Step 8 Practice Core upstream refinement: not executed; owner-approval cycle for each amendment is the legitimate gate.
- Step 6a archive-scale historical synthesis: not triggered.
- Step 4 experience-directory three-purpose audit: not executed; deferred.

Log regenerated.
